title: Silkablooie
description: Creepers may drop TNT when killed by a player with a Silk Touch pickaxe.
body:
## Overview

*How could he be both so controversial and so, so wrong?*

This mod adds the tools to allow certain mobs (such as creepers and as of 1.19.2, spiders) to drop specific bonus items if killed by pickaxes enchanted with Silk Touch.

By default, creepers have a 35% chance of dropping TNT. Spiders have a 35% chance of dropping cobwebs, and cave spiders have a 70% chance.

## Datapack-ability

There are two tiers of entities for TNT droppers and cobweb droppers, with different probabilities of dropping their respective goods (determined via the config). This leaves modpack devs with [four total tags](https://github.com/davidjjung/silkablooie/tree/master/src/generated/resources/data/silkablooie/tags/entity_types) to work with.  They can be replaced via datapack with the following tags in the namespace `silkablooie/tags/entity_types`:

`tnt_droppers`, `advanced_tnt_droppers`, `cobweb_droppers` and `advanced_cobweb_droppers`.

By default, the `advanced` title is reserved for more challenging variants such as cave spiders, cave creepers from [Creeper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul), or deepers/peepers from [Caverns & Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms).

## Config

You can configure the percent chance of the bonus drop occurring with each of the four tiers.

In addition, there is some extra compatibility with [Savage & Ravage](https://modrinth.com/mod/savage-and-ravage), wherein enabling `"SNR optional compat"` allows specifically creepers to drop spore bombs instead of TNT.

---

**Requires [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint) 6.2.0+.** Optional compatibility is included for [Savage & Ravage](https://modrinth.com/mod/savage-and-ravage), [Caverns & Chasms](https://www.teamabnormals.com/blog/caverns-and-chasms-beta), [Creeper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul), and [Neapolitan](https://modrinth.com/mod/neapolitan).

Feel free to direct any tweaks/suggestions towards the [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/silkablooie/issues). Thank you!
